title: Gothofreda dentata
intro: Gothofreda dentata, also known as Toothed Gothofreda or Toothed Celastrus, is a woody vine plant belonging to the Celastraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its purported health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation, improvement of cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. The bioactive constituents of Gothofreda dentata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Gothofreda dentata include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to address various health concerns, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
